title: Snailclimb/JavaGuide
summary: JavaGuide是一个全面的Java面试与后端开发指南，涵盖计算机基础、数据库、分布式、高并发及AI应用开发。
translated_summary: JavaGuide is a comprehensive Java interview and backend development guide covering computer fundamentals, databases, distributed systems, high concurrency, and AI application development.
